html:
Exclusive to:

The Quacken Drill is an Item exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be crafted from the Science Tab, is prototyped with an Alchemy Engine, and requires 1 Quacken Beak, 1 Gears and 2 Electrical Doodads to craft. Quacken Drills can be planted to create a Tar Slick, allowing one to farm Tar anywhere in the Deep or Medium Ocean. Drill is consumed during the drilling process.

Trivia

  • The Quacken Drill was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
  • Despite the image for the Quacken Drill having a bamboo handle, no Bamboo is needed to craft it.


DSTDSRoGSWHam

–WX-78

–Wickerbottom

–Woodie

–Maxwell

–Wagstaff

–Wigfrid
“It might help us find more tar.”
–Webber
“This is not a drill! Wait, it totally is.”
–Walani

–Warly
“Thar b'a drill.”
–Woodlegs
“IT PUNCHETH THE GROUND”

“Finds the Gloopy Pools”
–Wormwood
“Too bad tar tycoons aren't as rich as oil tycoons.”
–Wheeler
The Quacken Drill is an Item exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC. It can be crafted from the Science Tab, is prototyped with an Alchemy Engine, and requires 1 Quacken Beak, 1 Gears and 2 Electrical Doodads to craft. Quacken Drills can be planted to create a Tar Slick, allowing one to farm Tar anywhere in the Deep or Medium Ocean. Drill is consumed during the drilling process.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Quacken Drill was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
Despite the image for the Quacken Drill having a bamboo handle, no Bamboo is needed to craft it.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Máy Khoan Quacken là một Vật Phẩm độc quyền trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó có thể được chế tạo từ Thẻ Khoa học, được tạo nguyên mẫu bằng Máy Giả kim và cần 1 Mỏ Quacken, 1 Bánh răng và 2 Doodad Điện để chế tạo. Quacken Drills có thể được trồng để tạo ra Tar Slick, cho phép người ta farm Tar ở bất kỳ đâu trong Đại dương Sâu hoặc Trung bình. Mũi khoan được tiêu thụ trong quá trình khoan.

The '''Quacken Drill''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It can be crafted from the [[Science Tab]], is prototyped with an [[Alchemy Engine]], and requires 1 [[Quacken Beak]], 1 [[Gears]] and 2 [[Electrical Doodad]]s to craft. Quacken Drills can be planted to create a [[Tar Slick]], allowing one to farm [[Tar]] anywhere in the [[Ocean#Shipwrecked|Deep or Medium Ocean]]. Drill is consumed during the drilling process.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Quacken Drill was added to the ''Shipwrecked'' DLC more than a year after its official completion in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21st, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
* Despite the image for the Quacken Drill having a bamboo handle, no [[Bamboo]] is needed to craft it.
